RBR_THR Register

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x4
Source:
reg_spec_ref.rdl

Description

Transmitter Holding Register (Write) / Receiver Buffer Register (Read). Data masking depends on LCR.WLS bits (5-8 bits).

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] RSVD r 0x0 Reserved
[7:0] DATA rw 0x0 Data

Field Descriptions

DATA - Data

UART Data byte. When writing, triggers transmission logic. When reading, clears LSR.DR bit.
